projects.name: Holdet TDF bot
projects.goal: Autonomously field the optimal holdet.dk Tour de France 2026 team every single day and beat the human field — hands-off, with only a human veto.
projects.note: Pre-Tour: stage 1 startlist still pending, so the daily brains correctly report 'no material change'. Watch for Tour start.

projects.name: Personal stock dashboard
projects.goal: A calm, trust-first decision instrument that tells me — in one glance — the single sized move my broker never would, and honestly says 'do nothing' when that's right.

projects.name: Alexanders Brief
projects.goal: Publish a trustworthy, beautifully-edited Danish morning brief every day before 06:40 — sharper and broader than any single newspaper.

projects.name: Routine Overview
projects.goal: Hold the whole picture across every routine and interrupt Alexander only when something genuinely needs him.

routines.name: Overview self-improve
routines.does: Ships one low-risk, high-reward maintenance/design improvement to this overview per run (or nothing), toward the Anthropic aesthetic.
routines.headline: improve: roster note only shows on green rows so a stale routine's headline matches its dot

routines.name: Daily news brief
routines.does: Researches, validates and publishes the Danish morning brief before the 06:40 deadline.
routines.headline: published 2026-07-17

routines.name: Rolling weekly (Ugen)
routines.does: Refreshes the 7-day rollup edition from the published dailies.
routines.headline: rolling weekly: 2026-07-17

routines.name: Daily deadline check
routines.does: Verifies today's brief published before 06:40; push-alerts only on a confirmed miss.
routines.headline: advisory — silent unless it fails

routines.name: Health monitor
routines.does: Checks the live brief pages are reachable; push-alerts only on confirmed failure.
routines.headline: advisory — silent unless it fails

routines.name: Dashboard self-improve
routines.does: Ships at most ONE strictly-better improvement to the stock dashboard per run via reviewed PR (or nothing).
routines.headline: docs(auto-log): record the 2026-07-16 maintenance run

routines.name: Stock maintenance
routines.does: Structural maintenance passes on the stock dashboard.
routines.headline: docs(auto-log): record the 2026-07-16 maintenance run
routines.review: Retired 2026-07-03 — was the redundant second stock maintainer (13:00); 'Dashboard self-improve' (02:00) is now the single canonical guardrailed pass. Disabled in scheduler; config synced to match.

routines.name: Watchlist integration
